name: ACCO BRANDS Corp
business: ACCO Brands is a leading global consumer, technology and business branded products company, providing well-known brands and innovative product solutions used in schools, homes and at work. Our products are sold primarily in the U.S., Europe, Australia, Canada, Brazil, and Mexico.

exposures.sentence: ACCO Brands is a leading global consumer, technology and business branded products company, providing well-known brands and innovative product solutions used in schools, homes and at work.
Our gaming accessories business depends on maintaining our licensing rights with key gaming console manufacturers and video game publishers.
Our audio products business depends in part on certifications as to their compatibility with third party communications platforms.

We have experienced, and could experience, disruptions in our global supply chain due to insufficient freight carrier capacity, port delays and closures, the cost and availability of international and domestic freight carriers, labor shortages, rapidly changing labor policies, and geopolitical unrest.

catalysts.event: Multi-year restructuring program to achieve $100 million annualized pre-tax cost savings
catalysts.sentence: In 2025, the Company increased its savings target by $40 million, and now anticipates the multi-year program to yield approximately $100 million in annualized pre-tax cost savings by the end of 2026.
